offers.title: Early Bird Special
offers.description: Book 30 days in advance and get 20% off
offers.terms: Valid for new bookings only. Cannot be combined with other offers.

offers.title: Weekend Getaway
offers.description: Stay 2 nights on weekend and get 1 night free
offers.terms: Valid for Friday-Sunday stays. Subject to availability.

offers.title: Honeymoon Package
offers.description: Romantic package with champagne, flowers, and late checkout
offers.terms: Valid for couples only. Marriage certificate may be required.

offers.title: Business Traveler
offers.description: Special rates for corporate bookings with free airport transfer
offers.terms: Valid for business travelers with corporate ID.
